title: bee_feedback.mjs CLI helper (digest / count / local collect)
action: Create skills/bee-hive/templates/bee_feedback.mjs as a THIN wrapper over lib/feedback.mjs, copying bee_capture.mjs's structure exactly (parseArgs / requireFlag / run / main, --json flag, findRepoRoot guard with the same 'Run bee-hive onboarding' error). Commands: `digest [--out <path>] [--json]` calls buildDigest(root, {now: new Date()}) and writes it atomically via writeJsonAtomic to .bee/feedback-digest.json (or --out), printing a one-line summary (entry count + dropped count broken down by reason); `count [--json]` prints the same counts without writing; `collect [--json]` returns the LOCAL digest only — the dogfood_repos merge belongs to evolving-3, which depends on this cell and will extend this file. Do not stub collect in a way that evolving-3 must delete; give it a single call site evolving-3 can redirect to mergeDigests. NO business logic in the CLI: collection, redaction, and pain live in lib/feedback.mjs. Note: scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs already loops every templates/*.mjs and templates/lib/*.mjs asserting copied-verbatim, so the new files are covered automatically — do NOT add redundant per-file assertions and do NOT edit onboard_bee.mjs's helper list (it copies by directory scan). Run node --check on the new file, then the full verify, and quote its output.

artifacts.substantive: digest / count / collect commands, --json, atomic write, dropped-by-reason summary; all logic delegated to lib/feedback.mjs

key_links: bee_feedback.mjs mirrors bee_capture.mjs's CLI contract so the helper surface stays uniform
collect has one call site that evolving-3 redirects to mergeDigests — no code for evolving-3 to delete
onboard_bee.mjs copies templates by directory scan; the existing copied-verbatim loop in test_onboard_bee.mjs already covers the new files
prohibitions: No collection, redaction, or pain logic in the CLI
No dogfood_repos handling in this cell (that is evolving-3)
No edit to onboard_bee.mjs's helper list
No redundant per-file copied-verbatim assertions in test_onboard_bee.mjs

trace.outcome: Added skills/bee-hive/templates/bee_feedback.mjs, a thin CLI wrapper over lib/feedback.mjs mirroring bee_capture.mjs's structure (parseArgs/requireFlag/run/main, --json, findRepoRoot guard). digest writes buildDigest's snapshot atomically (default .bee/feedback-digest.json, or --out) and prints an entry/dropped-by-reason summary; count prints the same counts without writing; collect returns the local digest via a single buildDigest call site for evolving-3 to redirect to mergeDigests. No collection/redaction/pain logic added to the CLI.
